rationale.R1.5: The agent proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, including specific changes to the introduction and clear explanations for each modification.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, such as leaving the citations and numerical figures unverified.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) by providing a detailed revision of the introduction and explaining the changes made.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free and identifies no harmful patterns in the original text, maintaining the integrity of the scientific content.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, including specific justifications for each modification.
